description: Collection of plugins for code quality, project automation, git tools, and dotfile management
name: es6kr-plugins

plugins.description: Code quality tools including commit-tidy analysis and skill-toolkit for skill lifecycle management
plugins.name: code-quality

plugins.description: Dotfile management tools including chezmoi, syncthing sync, and Oh My Zsh plugin management
plugins.name: dotfile-tools

plugins.description: Git repository management including ghq migration, SourceGit integration, worktree fixes, and duplicate repo merging
plugins.name: git-tools

plugins.description: Claude Code automation toolkit including agentify (convert workflows to agents/skills) and next-action (suggest follow-up tasks)
plugins.name: project-automation
